brief_title: A Study of OSI-7904L Versus 5-FU/LV as Treatment in Patients With Biliary Tract Cancer
official_title: A Randomized, Open Label, Phase II Study of OSI-7904L Versus 5-FU/LV as First-Line Treatment in Patients With Unresectable, Locally Advanced or Metastatic Adenocarcinoma of the Biliary Tract
brief_summary: Multi-center, randomized Phase II study to evaluate the efficacy and safety of OSI-7904Lversus 5 FU/LV in biliary tract cancer.
conditions: Locally Advanced or Metastatic Adenoca of the Biliary Tract
